category_statements.public_short: Hapax is a live, single-operator research instrument for studying whether AI systems can ground themselves in a real life, a real room, and a real public surface.
category_statements.public_positioning: Hapax is a single-operator autonomous grounding lab: a live system that senses a room, reads a vault, recruits agents, governs consent, renders its own state, and streams the evidence of whether its claims are grounded.
category_statements.private_construction_note: This dossier prepares private evidence and reusable positioning. It does not authorize publication, monetization, public safety, rights clearance, or truth authority by itself.

near_neighbor_comparisons.what_it_shares: Automated hypothesis, evidence, and evaluation loops.
near_neighbor_comparisons.why_generic_category_fails: The subject, instrument, lab, and public surface are one operator/studio system rather than a separable experimental platform.
near_neighbor_comparisons.retained_signal: Use closed-loop evidence language without implying broad scientific automation.

near_neighbor_comparisons.why_generic_category_fails: Hapax does not optimize a material experiment independent of operator life and public-claim governance.
near_neighbor_comparisons.retained_signal: Keep the loop discipline; reject generic material-lab framing.

near_neighbor_comparisons.what_it_shares: Agents read, summarize, route, and prepare work.
near_neighbor_comparisons.why_generic_category_fails: Assistance is not the object. The object is whether the operating environment can ground its own claims.
near_neighbor_comparisons.retained_signal: Use assistant capabilities as substrate evidence, not product category.

near_neighbor_comparisons.what_it_shares: Claims are compared with external state.
near_neighbor_comparisons.why_generic_category_fails: The benchmark is lived, temporal, rights-bound, and public/private gated rather than a static dataset.

near_neighbor_comparisons.what_it_shares: The vault is a central memory and evidence surface.
near_neighbor_comparisons.why_generic_category_fails: PKM does not explain runtime sensing, public-event conversion, or claim authority gates.
near_neighbor_comparisons.retained_signal: Treat the vault as one evidence substrate.

near_neighbor_comparisons.why_generic_category_fails: The aim is not wellness optimization; it is an n=1 grounding and public-evidence apparatus.

near_neighbor_comparisons.what_it_shares: Synthetic public surface and continuous audience-facing output.
near_neighbor_comparisons.why_generic_category_fails: The surface is an instrument panel and research vehicle, not a character-first entertainment lane.
near_neighbor_comparisons.retained_signal: Keep legible public surface mechanics without making entertainment the claim.

near_neighbor_comparisons.what_it_shares: Aesthetic substrates carry visible system state.
near_neighbor_comparisons.why_generic_category_fails: Beauty, novelty, or texture cannot grant truth, rights, privacy, public status, or monetization status.
near_neighbor_comparisons.retained_signal: Use aesthetic evidence display as spectacle spine, not authority.

near_neighbor_comparisons.what_it_shares: Runtime state is rendered as operational telemetry.
near_neighbor_comparisons.why_generic_category_fails: Observability alone omits consent, evidence conversion, public claims, and monetization boundaries.

near_neighbor_comparisons.what_it_shares: Public artifacts can become support, licensing, or platform revenue.
near_neighbor_comparisons.why_generic_category_fails: Revenue must be automation-only and evidence-gated; perks, service loops, and audience capture are refused.
near_neighbor_comparisons.retained_signal: Retain only no-perk, aggregate, guarded support rails.

allowed_claims: Hapax is an n=1 live epistemic lab for one operator.
The system can report witnessed evidence about its own runtime state when source refs are present.
A public artifact may describe a bounded, source-qualified episode after target-specific gates pass.
forbidden_claims: public safety readiness from private evidence
monetization readiness from engagement or aesthetic quality

sced_best_framing.case_scope: one operator, one studio, one public-surface system

refusal_conversions: manual replay packaging without an automation path
automation_doctrine.doctrine_note: If a value stream cannot be automated, legally attested once, or bounded as guarded bootstrap work, it becomes a refusal artifact.

structured_diagrams.title: Subject / instrument / studio / publisher fusion
structured_diagrams.claim_limit: Fusion explains the category; it does not grant public claim authority.

structured_diagrams.title: Truth spine
structured_diagrams.claim_limit: Public claims cannot outrun the weakest evidence gate.

structured_diagrams.title: Spectacle spine
structured_diagrams.claim_limit: Spectacle can focus attention but cannot grant truth, rights, privacy, public status, or money status.

structured_diagrams.title: Public-event loop
structured_diagrams.claim_limit: Public output is a gated conversion and cannot be the default result of runtime state.

reuse_profiles.reuse_note: Reusable for private applications and institutional packets; not public release authority.
Replay demo copy stays blocked or dry-run until the full evidence chain is present.
Platform packaging cannot use engagement or aesthetic quality to bypass evidence, rights, egress, or monetization gates.
Dataset framing remains dry-run until source refs and privacy/rights labels are complete.
Artifacts inherit the weakest evidence and rights label.
Support copy must remain no-perk, aggregate-only, and non-service.
Residency packets use private evidence unless a separate public-event gate passes.
Licensing needs explicit rights/provenance and cannot become consulting-as-service.

notes: Engagement, revenue potential, trends, and operator desire are opportunity signals only.
Aesthetic force can help public legibility but cannot upgrade truth, rights, privacy, provenance, egress, public status, or monetization status.
Selected, scheduled, commanded, or recruited is not success without witnessed outcome evidence.
Refusals and corrections can prove governance behavior but cannot validate the refused claim.
